main.description: Delete a branding asset blob. Requires admin authorization.

key.description: Branding asset key (mainLogo, favicon, siteTitle, etc.)

broadcaster.description: DID of the broadcaster. If not provided, uses the server's default broadcaster.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The authenticated DID is not authorized to modify branding

errors.name: BrandingNotFound
errors.description: The requested branding asset does not exist
